TEn: Registrar selects 'Add Professor' to enter a new Professor's details
SP: Registrar enters Professor details
Retrieve existing Professor record to check for duplicates
Create new Professor record in storage
Display error or confirmation message to Registrar

TEn: A Registrar needs to enquire on a Professor's details
SP: Registrar enters Professor ID
Retrieve Professor record from storage
Display Professor details to Registrar
Display error message if Professor not found

TEn: A Registrar needs to modify a Professor's details
SP: Registrar submits modified Professor details
Retrieve existing Professor record for validation
Update Professor record in storage
Display confirmation or error message to Registrar

TEn: A Registrar needs to delete a Professor's record
SP: Registrar selects Delete Professor and confirms deletion
Send Professor ID to Course Catalog to check commitments
Receive response from Course Catalog on Course Offering commitments
Retrieve Professor record from storage for deletion
Delete Professor record from storage
Display confirmation or error message to Registrar

TEn: Professor selects Enquire on Course Offerings
SP: Professor enters his ID
Retrieve Professor qualifications from storage
Send Professor qualifications to Course Catalog
Receive relevant Course Offerings from Course Catalog
Display Professor Department to Professor
Display returned Course Offerings to Professor
Display error message if no Course Offerings are available
